headline: Humans outperform Stockfish in King's Indian Defense: Orthodox Variation, Classical System (E98), while Benoni Defense: Old Benoni (A44) is the most frequently misplayed opening.

forecast.insight: The ARIMA forecast indicates stable win-rate trends across 20 tracked openings, with the steepest trend belonging to English Opening: Four Knights System, Nimzowitsch Variation (A28).

engine_delta.insight: Humans outperform Stockfish in 5 openings, while underperforming in 5 others, indicating significant skill-based advantages in certain openings.

heatmap.insight: Category-level analysis reveals that openings with complex pawn structures tend to have more stable win-rate trends, while openings with rapid development tend to have more volatile trends.
